description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On January 21, 2026 at 11:36 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a 
collision involving an SUV on W. 30th Street near Normandie Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling westbound on W. 30th Street in autonomous mode when it slowed to a stop to yield to a stopped SUV facing 
west in-lane. While the Waymo AV remained stopped, the SUV started to reverse towards the Waymo AV, and the test driver transitioned 
the Waymo AV to manual mode. The SUV continued to reverse and the rear left side of the SUV made contact with the front of the 
stationary Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the 
Waymo AV in manual mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
